description_long: This object is a retro-styled mobile phone with a rectangular body and a slightly tapered profile. The front features a large, black, rectangular screen bordered by a light blue frame, with a numeric keypad below that includes both number and function keys in matching blue. The back is predominantly light blue with a white lower section, and it displays a prominent white Apple logo near the top center, flanked by two small circular elements that resemble camera lenses or sensors. The sides are slim and show a clear separation between the blue and white materials, with no visible buttons or ports. The overall design is minimalist, with a smooth, hard plastic exterior and a matte finish, evoking the look of early 2000s mobile devices.
description: A retro-inspired mobile phone with a blue and white body, large black screen, and a blue numeric keypad, featuring a white Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large black screen with a blue border and a blue numeric keypad below.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim profile and the separation between the blue front and white back.
description_view_2: Back view displays a white Apple logo centered near the top, two small circular elements above, and a ribbed white lower section.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the device's thinness and color separation.
attribute_brand_logo: A white Apple logo is centered near the top of the back panel, clearly visible against the light blue background.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Two small circular elements resembling camera modules or sensors are located near the top center of the back panel, arranged vertically.
attribute_button_layout: A numeric keypad with twelve square blue buttons is located below the screen on the front; no side or top buttons are visible.
